notes: source_manifest.json is the manifest and is intentionally not self-hashed.
The project-root markdown files may remain as editable method-library notes, but the packaged skill must not depend on them.
When root references change, copy the updated versions into this skill and update the hashes before publishing.
Shadow Observer events and candidate rules are learning evidence, not automatic permission to mutate the skill.
Temporary-thread observer candidates remain draft evidence until accepted in the SSOT main thread.
